import React from 'react'; import { useFormik } from 'formik'; import './App.css'; import Main from './main'; import { BrowserRouter, Route, Routes, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Formik, Form, Field } from 'formik'; import * as Yup from 'yup'; const SignupForm = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const validationSchema = Yup.object().shape({ Name: Yup.string().required('Name is required'), Address: Yup.string().required('Address is required'), mobile: Yup.string().required('Mobile Number is required').matches(/^[0-9]{10}$/, 'Mobile Number must be 10 digits'), city: Yup.string().required('City is required'), district: Yup.string().required('District is required'), census: Yup.string().required('Census Code is required'), feeder: Yup.string().required('Feeder Code is required'), subdivision: Yup.string().required('Subdivision Name is required'), routecode: Yup.string().required('Route Code is required'), consumerno: Yup.string().required('Consumer No is required'), meterno: Yup.string().required('Meter No is required'), billmonth: Yup.string().required('Bill Month is required'), billdate: Yup.string().required('Bill Date is required'), duedate: Yup.string().required('Due Date is required'), fromdate: Yup.string().required('From Date is required'), todate: Yup.string().required('To Date is required'), maxdemand: Yup.string().required('Max Demand is required'), feedercode: Yup.string().required('Feeder Code is required'), meterrentcode: Yup.string().required('Meter Rent Code is required'), unitcr: Yup.string().required('Unit CR is required'), unitpr: Yup.string().required('Unit PR is required'), unitc: Yup.string().required('Unit C is required'), reactiveunitcr: Yup.string().required('Reactive Unit CR is required'), reactiveunitpr: Yup.string().required('Reactive Unit PR is required'), reactiveunitc: Yup.string().required('Reactive Unit C is required'), importcr: Yup.string().required('Import CR is required'), importpr: Yup.string().required('Import PR is required'), importc: Yup.string().required('Import C is required'), exportcr: Yup.string().required('Export CR is required'), exportpr: Yup.string().required('Export PR is required'), exportc: Yup.string().required('Export C is required'), security: Yup.string().required('Security is required'), hpkw: Yup.string().required('HP/KW is required'), fixedcharge: Yup.string().required('Fixed Charge is required'), energycharge: Yup.string().required('Energy Charge is required'), mincharge: Yup.string().required('Min Charge is required'), reactivecharge: Yup.string().required('Reactive Charge is required'), toucharge: Yup.string().required('TOU Charge is required'), fuelcharge: Yup.string().required('Fuel Charge is required'), eleduty: Yup.string().required('Ele Duty is required'), meterrent: Yup.string().required('Meter Rent is required'), fmc: Yup.string().required('FMC is required'), dpc: Yup.string().required('DPC is required'), tamt: Yup.string().required('T Amt is required'), pbill: Yup.string().required('P Bill is required'), discreb: Yup.string().required('Disc/Reb is required'), totalamt1: Yup.string().required('Total Amt 1 is required'), arrears: Yup.string().required('Arrears is required'), solarpr: Yup.string().required('Solar PR is required'), solarbc: Yup.string().required('Solar BC is required'), totalamt2: Yup.string().required('Total Amt 2 is required'), govtrelief: Yup.string().required('Govt Relief is required'), totalamt3: Yup.string().required('Total Amt 3 is required'), totalpayment: Yup.string().required('Total Payment is required'), adjustment: Yup.string().required('Adjustment is required'), fpppa: Yup.string().required('FPPPA is required'), totalamt4: Yup.string().required('Total Amt 4 is required'), theft: Yup.string().required('Theft is required'), litigation: Yup.string().required('Litigation is required'), month1: Yup.string().required('Month 1 is required'), month2: Yup.string().required('Month 2 is required'), month3: Yup.string().required('Month 3 is required'), unitmonth1: Yup.string().required('Unit Month 1 is required'), unitmonth2: Yup.string().required('Unit Month 2 is required'), unitmonth3: Yup.string().required('Unit Month 3 is required'), amountmonth1: Yup.string().required('Amount Month 1 is required'), amountmonth2: Yup.string().required('Amount Month 2 is required'), amountmonth3: Yup.string().required('Amount Month 3 is required'), }); const formik = useFormik({ initialValues: { Name: '', Address: '', mobile: '', city: '', district: '', census: '', feeder: '', subdivision: '', routecode: '', billmonth: '', billdate: '', duedate: '', fromdate: '', todate: '', consumerno: '', meterno: '', maxdemand: '', feedercode: '', meterrentcode: '', unitcr: '', unitpr: '', unitc: '', reactiveunitcr: '', reactiveunitpr: '', reactiveunitc: '', importcr: '', importpr: '', importc: '', exportcr: '', exportpr: '', exportc: '', security: '', hpkw: '', fixedcharge: '', energycharge: '', mincharge: '', reactivecharge: '', toucharge: '', fuelcharge: '', eleduty: '', meterrent: '', fmc: '', dpc: '', tamt: '', pbill: '', discreb: '', totalamt1: '', arrears: '', solarpr: '', solarbc: '', totalamt2: '', govtrelief: '', totalamt3: '', totalpayment: '', adjustment: '', fpppa: '', totalamt4: '', theft: '', litigation: '', month1: '', month2: '', month3: '', unitmonth1: '', unitmonth2: '', unitmonth3: '', amountmonth1: '', amountmonth2: '', amountmonth3: '',}, validationSchema: validationSchema, onSubmit: (values) => { navigate('/main', { state: values }); }, }); const shouldShowError = (field) => (formik.touched[field] || formik.submitCount > 0) && formik.errors[field]; const handleSubmitAllTouched = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const allTouched = Object.keys(formik.values).reduce((acc, key) => { acc[key] = true; return acc; }, {}); formik.setTouched(allTouched); formik.handleSubmit(e); }; // const handleClick = (e) => { // navigate('/main'); // }; return (
